_notes: conscript_rifles reuses canonical s09 ref (tools/meshy/units/conscript_rifleman/refs/styles/s09_comic_noir.png) — not listed here. Cue lines change body-mass silhouette at battle distance, never headgear-only.
militia_squad: ONE single character only — no turnaround, no side/back view sheet, no duplicate clones. Full-body, ¾ front, neutral A-pose standing (rig-friendly), worn hunting rifle held at side. A civilian militiaman in a mismatched patched jacket and rolled sleeves, single leather bandolier across the chest, trousers tucked into work boots. Mid-stocky ~5 head-heights, slightly oversized head and hands. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. Flat even studio lighting, plain solid light-grey background, no ground shadow, no atmosphere. Hard clear material boundaries (cloth / leather / metal / wood). Baseline lean infantry silhouette, no armor plates, no backpack.
field_medic: ONE single character only — no turnaround, no side/back view sheet, no duplicate clones. Full-body, ¾ front, neutral A-pose standing (rig-friendly), no weapon. A field medic in a plain uniform with a bone-white armband, carrying an oversized bulging medic satchel slung low on one hip plus a second canvas kit bag on the opposite shoulder — the satchel bulk is the silhouette cue. Mid-stocky ~5 head-heights, slightly oversized head and hands. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. Flat even studio lighting, plain solid light-grey background, no ground shadow, no atmosphere. Hard clear material boundaries (cloth / leather / metal / wood). No backpack — the hip satchel IS the mass cue.
machine_gun_nest: ONE single structure only — no turnaround sheet, no alternate views, no duplicates. A low ring of stacked sandbags forming a fixed machine-gun emplacement, a heavy water-cooled machine gun on a tripod mounted at its center with a long barrel projecting over the bags, ammo crate beside it, no crew. ¾ front view. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. Flat even studio lighting, plain solid light-grey background, no ground shadow, no atmosphere. Hard clear material boundaries (burlap / wood / metal). Silhouette cue: squat sandbag ring plus one long projecting gun barrel.
trench_works: ONE single structure only — no turnaround sheet, no alternate views, no duplicates. A short L-shaped section of earth-and-timber trench: packed-dirt walls shored with wooden planks, sandbag parapet along the top edge, no weapons, no crew, no flags. ¾ front elevated view. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. Flat even studio lighting, plain solid light-grey background, no ground shadow, no atmosphere. Hard clear material boundaries (earth / wood / burlap). Silhouette cue: long low L-shaped wall mass, clearly a fortification not a vehicle.
line_grenadiers: ONE single character only — no turnaround, no side/back view sheet, no duplicate clones. Full-body, ¾ front, neutral A-pose standing (rig-friendly), stubby carbine slung at side. A uniformed union infantryman strapped with ordnance: two crossed grenade bandoliers over the chest and bulky satchel charges hanging at both hips — the strapped-ordnance torso bulk is the silhouette cue. Mid-stocky ~5 head-heights, slightly oversized head and hands. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. Flat even studio lighting, plain solid light-grey background, no ground shadow, no atmosphere. Hard clear material boundaries (cloth / leather / metal / wood). No backpack.
field_mortar_team: ONE single character only — no turnaround, no side/back view sheet, no duplicate clones. Full-body, ¾ front, neutral A-pose standing (rig-friendly). An artillery crewman in an OLIVE-DRAB GREEN uniform (no blue anywhere) carrying a stubby mortar tube on one shoulder and a heavy round baseplate strapped to his back like a pack — the tube plus baseplate pack IS the silhouette mass cue. Mid-stocky ~5 head-heights, slightly oversized head and hands. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. Flat even studio lighting, plain solid light-grey background, no ground shadow, no atmosphere. Hard clear material boundaries (cloth / leather / metal / wood).
sharpshooter: ONE single character only — no turnaround, no side/back view sheet, no duplicate clones. Full-body, ¾ front, neutral A-pose standing (rig-friendly), extra-long scoped bolt rifle held vertically at side, taller than the figure's shoulder. A slim marksman under a ragged hooded shroud-cape that drapes over both shoulders and back — the cape drape plus over-long rifle is the silhouette cue. Mid-stocky ~5 head-heights, slightly oversized head and hands. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. Flat even studio lighting, plain solid light-grey background, no ground shadow, no atmosphere. Hard clear material boundaries (cloth / leather / metal / wood). No backpack — the cape IS the mass cue.
iron_guard: ONE single character only — no turnaround, no side/back view sheet, no duplicate clones. Full-body, ¾ front, neutral A-pose standing (rig-friendly), short rifle at side and a rectangular full-height tower shield resting against the other arm. A heavy union line-breaker in a thick riveted steel cuirass with plated shoulders — the widest, heaviest infantry silhouette in the faction; armor bulk plus shield slab is the cue. Mid-stocky ~5 head-heights, slightly oversized head and hands. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. Flat even studio lighting, plain solid light-grey background, no ground shadow, no atmosphere. Hard clear material boundaries (cloth / leather / metal / wood). No backpack.

Full-body, ¾ front, neutral A-pose standing (rig-friendly), no weapon, binoculars hanging on the chest. A slight signals officer in an OLIVE-DRAB GREEN uniform (no blue anywhere) carrying a large boxy field-radio pack on his back with a single whip antenna — the radio pack IS the silhouette mass cue. Mid-stocky ~5 head-heights, slightly oversized head and hands. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. shock_sergeant: ONE single character only — no turnaround, no side/back view sheet, no duplicate clones. Full-body, ¾ front, neutral A-pose standing (rig-friendly), compact submachine gun held at side. A union assault sergeant in a long heavy greatcoat flaring wide below the knee over a light armored chest rig — the greatcoat flare is the silhouette cue, clearly broader at the hem than any rifleman. Mid-stocky ~5 head-heights, slightly oversized head and hands. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. Flat even studio lighting, plain solid light-grey background, no ground shadow, no atmosphere. Hard clear material boundaries (cloth / leather / metal / wood). No backpack.
breakthrough_tank: ONE single vehicle only — no turnaround sheet, no alternate views, no duplicates. A massive interwar-style breakthrough tank: tall riveted slab hull, full-length tracks wrapping the hull silhouette, one stubby heavy main gun in a low front-mounted casemate, exhaust stacks at the rear. ¾ front view, ground level. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. Flat even studio lighting, plain solid light-grey background, no ground shadow, no atmosphere. Hard clear material boundaries (steel plate / rivets / track links). Silhouette cue: rhomboid track-dominated mass, unmistakably a land fortress not a car.
grand_battery: ONE single structure only — no turnaround sheet, no alternate views, no duplicates. A huge fixed siege artillery piece: one enormous long-barreled gun on a heavy riveted steel emplacement platform with a recoil cradle, ammunition shells racked beside the base, no crew, no wheels for travel. ¾ front view. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. Flat even studio lighting, plain solid light-grey background, no ground shadow, no atmosphere. Hard clear material boundaries (steel / wood / brass). Silhouette cue: one giant elevated barrel over a wide square platform base.
marksman_doctrine_officer: ONE single character only — no turnaround, no side/back view sheet, no duplicate clones. Full-body, ¾ front, neutral A-pose standing (rig-friendly). A composed union doctrine officer in a fitted trench coat, long scoped rifle slung diagonally across the back, leather map case on a strap at the hip — the diagonal slung rifle plus hip case reads at distance; NO cape, NO hood (distinct from the line sharpshooter). Mid-stocky ~5 head-heights, slightly oversized head and hands. Style: heavy-ink comic — thick black contour, crosshatch / hatched shadow, high contrast, limited olive / bone / leather / metal palette. Flat even studio lighting, plain solid light-grey background, no ground shadow, no atmosphere. Hard clear material boundaries (cloth / leather / metal / wood). No backpack.
